coupon.source_phrase_block: Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation (see additional instructions below). Dates: This pass is available for the following 2026 dates and ferries: Georges Island: May 15-June 14: Thursday through Sunday June 16-September 1: Daily Spectacle Island: July 15-September 1: Daily September 4-21: Thursday through Sunday September 26-October 13: Friday through Sunday Peddocks Island (from Hingham): June 15-September 7: Daily except Tuesday September 10-October 12: Thursday through Sunday Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 4 people at 50% off per person.
